title: Sort MY WORK alphabetically by board or task

posts.author: AdminB (AdminB)
posts.cookedHtml: I have multiple client boards with the same task, and a checklist sorted by alphabet that I want to use to update Monday. I want to sort the boards so I can simply cruise down the list checking them off, instead of hunting for the one I need to check next. Alternatively, if I could sort alphabetically by TASK instead of BOARD, I could also more easily check things off from an imported list. As it is, they are all mixed up, with a run of tasks with the same name, but then 3 or 4 tasks from the same board, then a run of other tasks, etc.
